titleStmt.title: SII 26.468: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 468. (A.R. No. 445 of 1909.) MAṆAPPAḌAIVĪḌU, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This damaged inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc., and mentions the queen Avanimuḻudum Uḍaiyār.

It records a sale of land to the dēvakaṉmis of the temple of the god Mahādēvar Mūṉrukaiyīśvaramuḍaiyanāyaṉār of Ambalattāḍinallūr in the eastern quarter of Uttamaśōḻach-chaturvvēdimaṅgalam in Kīḻkaḷak-kūṟṟam in Rājarājapāṇḍi-nāḍu, as tirumaḍaippaḷḷippuṟam by the mahāsabhai of the village. It is stated that the land in question was lying fallow and the dēvakaṉmis were required to reclaim it and use its products for the above-mentioned service in the temple. It is stated that the land lying amidst the sold land, and belonging to the god Tirunelvēliuḍaiyār are excluded. Amongst the boundaries of the land in question, the river Muḍikoṇḍaśōḻappērāṟu, [••••] maṇimaṅgalam, and Uttamaśōḻa-vāykkāl figure.
The signatories include Mahādēvaṉ, Vāsudēvaṉ, Śeṇpagā ••• ṉ of Kōmaḷam Śrīkṛishṇaṉ, Gōvindaṉ, Śaṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ and Śrīmāhēśvaraṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jeyamātu vaḷara nilaimakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭṭi grahanilai keṭṭa villavaṟkulaikāṉaṉ maṉṉavari ṟuluṟṟuḷi tarataka tikkaṉaittun tan cakkara naṭā
tti vijaiyābhiṣekam paṇṇiyaruḷiya virasiṅhāsanattuliruntu Aruḷiya Avanimuḻutum Uṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya gorājakecavamaṉaṉ tribhuvaṉa cakra- vattikaḷ śrīkulottu
ṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 3 vatu rājaraājapāṇṭināṭṭuk kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu Uttamacoḻaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu mahasabhaiyom Eṅ
kaḷūrkkiḻ piṭākai Ampalattāṭinallūril Eḻuntaruḷi Irukku mahāteva muṉṟukaiyiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟ tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟa
māka kana
prataṣṭhaiyi
lakkappaṭi
yil Udaka
m paṇṇina ṉilattukku peruṉāṉkellai Ā
vatu kiḻellai poṉṉa cunaikku meṟku
m teṉ Ellai veḷḷelum per Eriyi
l niṉṟum meṟkku nokki poṉa
ḻaṅkāṟ karaikku vaṭakkum melai Ellai caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ vāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai kolaikuḷattu ṟaik
kallukkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nilattil Uṭaiyār tirunelveli Uṭaiya nāyiṉār tevatāṉam
mintaka niṉṟa nilaṅ kāṭāyak kiṭantamaiyil yāṇṭu nāṟpattumuṉṟāvatu mutal devakaṉmi kamam 100 kaik koṇṭa
ḻi kalli payireṟṟikkoḷvārākavum Iddeva tevatāṉamāka kuṭuttu nilamāvatu Innāṉkellai Uṭ
ceyyum puṉceyyum nattappālum toṭṭamum to kkūṟum maṉapaṭu paḷḷamum teṉpaṭu nokkiṉa mara
mum kiḻ nokkiṉa kiṇaṟum kāṭu moṭaiyam maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭasamasataprāpti- kaḷum Innāyi mum paṇṇi muṉṟu
paṇiyum paṇittu Iṭaimalaip poṟṟaikkuk kiḻakkum ṉa poruntamāṉa muṭi koṇṭa coḻap perāṟṟukkut teṟkum
kiḻ Ellai Ac maṇimaṅkalattukku po peruvaḻikku meṟkum Itaṉ ṉellai Uttamacoḻaṉ vāykkālukku
vaṭakkum Iṉṉānkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nilattil kuṭi nikki nikki niṉṟa toṭṭamāy van vellaikku
vilaikoṇṭu rikavum Ippaṭi camma lilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇ
cammatittu tiruppaṭiyiṭu takampaṇṇi muṉṟu paṇiyum paṇintu pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyā
muṉṟukaiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Ippaṭikku Ivai ḷattu mahādevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vāsudevaṉ
devaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koma ḷattu ceṇpaka ṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai Iṟu śrī kraṣṇaṇ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai ṇippuṟattu govijaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku puṟattu śrīmāheśvaraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivai kaṇakka tiṉu
Ippaṭi nilattil tirunantava vaṉañceyyalum nikki niṉṟa Iṭam te Iṭam cekaiyyāl Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.468 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
